query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_leaderboard_players,
  SUM(CASE WHEN playerType = 'registered' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as registered_players,
  SUM(CASE WHEN playerType = 'guest' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_players
FROM (
  -- Registered users from cycle_history
  SELECT 
    u.name as playerName,
    'registered' as playerType,
    COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0) as totalPuzzles
  FROM users u
  LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
  WHERE u.id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.id, u.name
  HAVING SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) > 0
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Guest players from players table
  SELECT 
    p.name as playerName,
    'guest' as playerType,
    COALESCE(p.totalPuzzles, 0) as totalPuzzles
  FROM players p
  WHERE p.userId IS NULL AND p.totalPuzzles > 0
) combined_players;

  HAVING SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) > 0

  -- Guest players from players table
